Surname.jp: 運命の人を一途に愛する乙女

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Shocked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>感電</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>감전</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>触电</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The damage increases if the target has been inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Shocked</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。対象が<color=#28d9ed>感電</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed> 스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다. 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>감전</color> 상태라면 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。当目标处于<color=#28d9ed>触电</color>状态时,伤害提升。

description.en: Attacks an enemy.\nDecreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>減少させ、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-30%</color> 감소시키고, <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人。\n使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>减少<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的概率使自身的<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive)\nIncreases Speed by <color=#28d9ed>2.5%</color> every turn (Max 20 stacks).\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle (Irremovable).
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n毎ターンスピードが<color=#28d9ed>2.5%</color>UPする。(最大20回累積)\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>と<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>がUPする。(解除不可)
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n매 턴 속도가 <color=#28d9ed>2.5%</color> 증가합니다. (최대 20회 누적)\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>이 증가합니다. (해제 불가)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每回合速度增加<color=#28d9ed>2.5%</color>。(最多叠加20次)\n战斗开始时,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>和<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>增加,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。(无法解除)

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Darkness

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Increases Damage Dealt by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

与えるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

피해량이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

伤害量提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
